text:
In the first scene, I feel like an observer perched on the edge of structure and routine—the glass wall separates me from others immersed in their collective pursuit, and invites me to contemplate my own presence on the outside, both seen and unseen.

In the second scene, the vibrant colors and the promise of research and development stimulate my curiosity, making me reflect on the ever-changing landscape of human knowledge and innovation. Here, I sense anticipation and the spark of possibility, compelled to think about our constant effort to advance and adapt.
